bio.scholar: Donald Trump returned to the presidency as the forty-seventh President in January 2025, becoming only the second person in American history (after Grover Cleveland) to serve non-consecutive terms. His second term began with a focus on immigration enforcement, trade policy, and government reorganization.
bio.explorer: Donald Trump came back as the forty-seventh president in 2025 — only the second person ever to leave the White House and come back! He's focused on immigration, trade deals, and changing how the government works.

text.scholar: Became only the second president to serve non-consecutive terms, winning the 2024 election after losing the 2020 race.
text.explorer: He made an amazing political comeback, winning the presidency again after losing four years earlier.

sources.citation: Miller Center: donald trump - Key Events

text.scholar: His return to office represented one of the most remarkable political comebacks in American history.
text.explorer: Coming back to win the presidency again was one of the biggest comebacks in American political history.

sources.citation: Miller Center: donald trump - Key Events

text.scholar: His second term continues with ongoing policy initiatives in immigration, trade, and government reform.
text.explorer: He's working on immigration, trade deals with other countries, and changing how the government is run.

sources.citation: Miller Center: donald trump - Key Events

text.scholar: Trump is only the second person to serve as president in two non-consecutive terms, following Grover Cleveland who served as the 22nd and 24th president.
text.explorer: Just like Grover Cleveland way back in the 1800s, Trump left the presidency and then came back!

sources.citation: Miller Center: donald trump - Key Events

text.scholar: At 78, he became one of the oldest people inaugurated as president.
text.explorer: He was 78 years old when he started his second term — one of the oldest presidents ever.

sources.citation: Miller Center: donald trump - Key Events

text.scholar: His vice president JD Vance, a former venture capitalist and author, was one of the youngest vice presidents in modern history.
text.explorer: His vice president JD Vance was pretty young for the job and used to be a writer and investor.

sources.citation: Miller Center: donald trump - Key Events
